creator: saper@saper.info
text:
Created attachment 210677
Update graphics/libmypaint to 1.4.0

Byproduct of the troubleshooting of https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=243267 (https://gitlab.gnome.org/GNOME/gimp/issues/4491):

it seems that GIMP upstream recommends libmypaint update to 1.4.0
